title: cyphia incisa
intro: Cyphia incisa, also known as the cut-leaved cyphia, is a perennial plant native to the Himalayas. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and treating digestive problems. Cyphia incisa can be prepared as a decoction, infusion, or powder, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
